title: calocarpum
intro: Calocarpum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Calocarpum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Calocarpum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
